adminSchoolSetup.title: School Setup
adminSchoolSetup.subtitle: Foundational parameters that make EduPortal work for your school.

guide.title: Initial Setup
guide.subtitle: Complete the steps below in order to start using EduPortal.

gradeRange.title: Grade Level Range
gradeRange.subtitle: Defines which grade levels exist at your school. Classes can only be created within this range.
gradeRange.hint: Examples: High School → 10–12 | Lower Sec. → 6–9 | Primary → 1–5. Platform limit: 1 ≤ min ≤ max ≤ 13.
gradeRange.unconfiguredBody: Classes cannot be created until this step is complete.
gradeRange.narrowingBody: Narrowing will be blocked if there are classes outside the new range. Please archive those classes before changing.

publishMode.title: Grade Publish Workflow
publishMode.subtitle: Choose how teachers publish grades to students and parents.

validation.required: Both min and max grades are required.
validation.outOfRange: Grade levels must be between 1 and 13.
validation.minExceedsMax: Min grade must not exceed max grade.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.narrowing-blocked: Cannot narrow — active classes exist in this range
errors.network-error: Could not reach the server, please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong, please try again.

departments.title: Subject Departments
departments.subtitle: Group subjects by discipline. Departments are the foundation for teacher assignment and position titles.

departments.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try adjusting the filter or clearing your search.
departments.archiveConfirmBody: Archive "{name}"? It will be hidden from new assignment options. Existing data is preserved.

createParentDialog.conceptHint: Display label shown in the UI (does not affect functionality).

subjects.title: Subject Catalogue
subjects.subtitle: Departments and grade-scoped subjects

subjects.selectDepartment: Select a department to view its subjects.
subjects.gradeRangeNote: New subjects must fall within this range.
subjects.archiveBlockedTooltip: Subject is in use — cannot archive

createSubjectDialog.title: New subject
createSubjectDialog.subtitle: Each subject is scoped to a single grade level.

subjectDetail.codeHint: Uppercase letters & digits, up to 16 chars.
subjectDetail.lockedBanner: These fields are the curriculum standard — they cannot be changed at the class level. Teachers will see these values when entering grades.
subjectDetail.lockedTooltip: This value flows down to the class level and cannot be edited by teachers.
subjectDetail.classOfferingsEmpty: No classes are using this subject yet.

errors.code-format: Invalid subject code. Use uppercase A–Z and digits 0–9, up to 16 characters.

errors.class-subject-in-use: Cannot archive — subject is in active use in this class.
